instruction: Create a Blueprint with an integer variable Score at 0. On overlap add 10 to Score and print Score: followed by the value.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ScoreDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Score: Int = 0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Score]
NODE n3: AddInt [B=10]
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Score]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Score: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ScoreDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Score: Int = 0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVariable [VarName="Score"]
NODE n3: AddFloat [B=10]
NODE n4: SetVariable [VarName="Score"]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Score: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_ScoreDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Score: Int = 0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVariable [VarName="Score"]
NODE n3: AddFloat [B=10]
NODE n4: SetVariable [VarName="Score"]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Score: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]

instruction: Create a Blueprint with float Health at 100. On AnyDamage subtract damage, print Health: followed by the new value.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Health: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Float]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Health: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Float]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_HealthDisplay
PARENT: Actor
VAR Health: Float = 100.0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_AnyDamage
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Health]
NODE n3: SubtractFloat
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Health]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Health: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Float]
DATA n1.Damage -> n3.B [Float]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Float]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on Tick gets actor location, breaks it into components, and prints the vector as a string.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_LocationDebug
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetActorLocation
NODE n3: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_LocationDebug
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetActorLocation
NODE n3: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute

DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_LocationDebug
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: GetActorLocation
NODE n3: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute

DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.InString [String]

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on overlap gets the display name of the overlapping actor and prints Overlapped by: followed by the name.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_NameOverlap
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetDisplayName
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="Overlapped by: "]
NODE n4: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Target [Actor]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_NameOverlap
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetDisplayName
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="Overlapped by: "]
NODE n4: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Target [Actor]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_NameOverlap
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetDisplayName
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="Overlapped by: "]
NODE n4: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.OtherActor -> n2.Target [Actor]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on Tick gets distance to the player pawn and prints Distance: followed by the value.

instruction: Create a Blueprint with integer Count at 0. On overlap increment Count and print Overlap Count: followed by the number.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_OverlapCounter
PARENT: Actor
VAR Count: Int = 0
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: VariableGet [VarName=Count]
NODE n3: AddInt [B=1]
NODE n4: VariableSet [VarName=Count]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Overlap Count: "]
NODE n6: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute
DATA n4.Value -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_OverlapCounter
PARENT: Actor

VAR Count: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Count]
NODE n3: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=Count]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Overlap Count: "]
NODE n6: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]
raw_output:

PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n3: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=Count]
NODE n5: Concatenate [A="Overlap Count: "]
NODE n6: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n6.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.A [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.Value [Int]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n5.B [String]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.InString [String]

instruction: Create a Blueprint that on Tick calculates FPS by dividing 1 by DeltaSeconds and prints FPS: followed by the value.
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_FPSCounter
PARENT: Actor
GRAPH: EventGraph
NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: DivideFloat [A=1.0]
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="FPS: "]
NODE n4: PrintString
EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute
DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.B [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]
actual_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_FPSCounter
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: DivideFloat [A=1.0]
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="FPS: "]
NODE n4: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.B [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]
raw_output:
BLUEPRINT: BP_FPSCounter
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_Tick
NODE n2: DivideFloat [A=1.0]
NODE n3: Concatenate [A="FPS: "]
NODE n4: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n4.Execute

DATA n1.DeltaSeconds -> n2.B [Float]
DATA n2.ReturnValue -> n3.B [String]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.InString [String]
